The Cinematic Guest Experience

Step in.
Move.
Walk away a star.

Glam Bot is a live slow-motion camera experience that turns every guest into the subject of a stunning, cinematic video — delivered to their phone before the night is over.

Bring Glam Bot to Your Event See how it works
The Concept

Not a photo booth.
A film set.

Glam Bot is a live slow-motion camera activation — a beautifully staged experience your guests step into, one at a time. You step in front of the camera, move with it as it moves, and within moments you have a stunning slow-motion video that looks like it was shot on a professional film set.

No apps. No waiting. No gimmicks. Just you, the camera, and a cinematic moment delivered instantly to your phone — ready to relive, share, and treasure forever.

"It stopped the room. Within twenty minutes, every single guest was in line."

— Sophia Laurent, Luxury Wedding Planner
The activation in the wild —
What Happens

Sixty seconds.
A lifetime on film.

Glam Bot is effortless for your guests and seamless for your event. No apps to download. No instructions to follow. Just step in, move, and watch the magic happen.

01

Step into the frame

Your guest approaches the Glam Bot — elegantly staged as part of the event's aesthetic. A dedicated on-site host guides them through the moment.

02

Move with the camera

The camera moves — and they move with it. No posing instructions, no awkward direction. Just a natural, fluid moment captured in breathtaking slow motion.

03

Watch yourself come alive

The slow-motion footage is processed on the spot. In moments, they see themselves the way a film director would — luminous, dynamic, unforgettable.

04

Download instantly

A QR code. A tap. Their cinematic video is on their phone before the night ends — ready to share, post, and keep forever.

Behind the Experience
Weddings

The reception moment they'll talk about for years

Drop Glam Bot into cocktail hour or the reception and watch it become the heartbeat of the evening. Guests line up, laugh, glow, and leave with a slow-motion video of themselves that feels like a scene from a film. Your wedding videographer gets gorgeous, ready-to-use footage built right into the celebration.

Cocktail Hour Receptions Bridal Parties Rehearsal Dinners
Corporate Events

The activation everyone is still talking about Monday morning

Holiday parties. Conferences. Product launches. Glam Bot turns any corporate event into something people actually look forward to. Every guest walks away with a professional, branded slow-motion video of themselves — content your media team will want, and a moment your team won't forget.

Holiday Parties Conferences Product Launches Galas
Every guest. Every moment.
On film.
What's Included

Every guest leaves with their moment on film.

Instant Download

Scan a QR code and it's yours. Every guest's slow-motion video is processed on-site and delivered to their phone before the night is over.

Videographer Ready

All footage is packaged and handed off to your wedding videographer or corporate media team — cinematic slow-motion clips ready to cut directly into the final edit.

Branded to Your Event

Every video carries your event's identity — logo, custom end slate, and finishing touches that make each clip feel like a natural extension of the celebration.

Investment

Bring Glam Bot to your event.

$14,000
Starting at

Each activation is custom-quoted based on event size, duration, and location. Pricing includes full equipment setup and breakdown, a dedicated on-site host, all guest video downloads, and a complete media package for your videographer or production team.
